us-politics.headline: Trump Reshuffles Intelligence Leadership, Sparks Controversy
us-politics.body:
President Trump's nomination of Bill Pulte to lead US intelligence agencies has triggered sharp debate. Conservative outlets argue Pulte brings fresh perspective, while critics question his qualifications for such a sensitive role.

The pick reflects ongoing tensions within Republican ranks. Some party members support Trump's unconventional approach, while others worry about potential national security implications. Pulte's background and preparedness remain central to the unfolding discussion.

sources.title: Why Trump picked Bill Pulte to lead US intelligence as critics question his qualifications
Divisions mount between GOP lawmakers, Trump, raising tensions

us-politics.headline: Primary Races Reshape Political Landscape in Western States
us-politics.body:
California and New Mexico primaries revealed significant political shifts this week. In California, Hilton and Becerra emerged as leading gubernatorial candidates, signaling potential changes in state leadership.

Former Interior Secretary Deb Haaland secured the New Mexico gubernatorial primary, highlighting Indigenous representation in high-level political roles. These contests underscore the dynamic nature of regional political competitions and emerging leadership trends.

sources.title: Hilton, Becerra lead in California’s governor primary. See live results here.
Former Biden official Deb Haaland wins New Mexico primary for governor
Los Angeles mayoral race narrows to Bass, Raman with Pratt loss

us-politics.headline: Election Integrity Debates Intensify Ahead of Midterms
us-politics.body:
Voter roll accuracy and election security have become flashpoint issues. The Republican National Committee pledged to enhance election integrity, citing concerns about noncitizens on voter rolls in Democrat-controlled states.

Democratic responses emphasize protecting voter access, while Republican strategists focus on potential vulnerabilities. The ongoing dispute reflects deeper partisan divisions about electoral processes and potential reform strategies.

sources.title: Noncitizens on voter rolls in Democrat-run state exposed as RNC chair pledges secure elections
Southern states’ new maps upend elections for candidates, voters
Political scandals once ended careers. Are they as powerful as they once were?

au-politics.headline: Political Tensions Flare as Hastie Attacks Hanson's MAGA Alignment
au-politics.body:
Liberal MP Andrew Hastie has launched a sharp critique of One Nation leader Pauline Hanson, accusing her of prioritizing a MAGA-style political approach over traditional Australian conservative values. The public confrontation highlights growing fractures within the right-wing political landscape.

Hastie's comments suggest deepening ideological divisions in the Coalition, with One Nation increasingly challenging mainstream Liberal Party positioning. The dispute underscores the complex political maneuvering as minor parties seek to differentiate themselves from major political brands.

sources.title: Andrew Hastie accuses Pauline Hanson of being ‘Maga first’ – as it happened
As One Nation nips at his heels the PM has no choice but to play the long game

au-politics.headline: Scam Network Targets Australians from Cambodian Call Centers
au-politics.body:
Australian authorities have uncovered detailed evidence of an extensive scam operation based in Cambodia systematically targeting Australian citizens. Leaked documents reveal sophisticated methods used by criminal networks to defraud unsuspecting victims.

The ABC reports that the scam's operational script provides unprecedented insight into how these international criminal groups manipulate communication technologies to exploit potential victims. Law enforcement agencies are now examining the documents to develop more robust protective strategies.

sources.title: Script reveals methods of Cambodian centre scamming Australians
Queensland magistrate suppresses identity of man with ‘high public profile’ in extortion case

world.headline: Iran-Israel Conflict Escalates with Mutual Air Strikes
world.body: Tensions between Iran and Israel have sharply intensified, with both nations launching air attacks against each other. The strikes signal a potential collapse of the recent ceasefire, raising fears of broader regional conflict. Yemen's Houthis have added to the volatility by declaring a ban on Israeli ships in the Red Sea - a move that could further complicate maritime security.

sources.title: Iran and Israel bomb each other: Is the ceasefire over?
Yemen’s Houthis declare ban on Israeli ships sailing the Red Sea
Israel and Iran exchange attacks as ceasefire falters
Iran war day 101: Tensions escalate as Iran and Israel trade air attacks

world.headline: Deadly Earthquake Strikes Southern Philippines - Tsunami Fears Linger
world.body: A powerful 7.8 magnitude earthquake has rocked the southern Philippines, killing at least 32 people and triggering tsunami warnings. The disaster has devastated local communities, with rescue teams scrambling to reach affected areas. Aftershocks continue to pose significant risks, and authorities are urging residents to remain vigilant and follow emergency protocols.

sources.title: At least 32 dead after major earthquake strikes southern Philippines
Philippines earthquake kills 15, prompts tsunami fears: All to know
Magnitude 7.8 earthquake rocks southern Philippines

world.headline: Armenia's Pro-West Government Wins Election Despite Russian Pressure
world.body: Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan has claimed victory in Armenia's parliamentary elections, securing a continued mandate for his pro-Western political agenda. The result comes despite significant pressure from Russia and represents a clear signal of Armenia's desire for closer ties with Western nations. Preliminary results show Pashinyan's party maintaining its parliamentary majority.

sources.title: Armenian PM Pashinyan declares victory in parliamentary elections
PM Pashinyan’s party wins Armenia election, preliminary results show
Armenia's pro-West government wins election despite Russian pressure

ai.headline: AI Reshapes Parenting and Work - Who's Really in Charge?
ai.body:
The lines between human and artificial intelligence are blurring in unexpected domains. Momfluencers are now pitching AI as a superior co-parent - a trend that signals deeper anxieties about modern family dynamics and technological dependency. 

Simultaneously, tech workers are grappling with AI's disruptive potential. Online discussions reveal growing unease about large language models eroding traditional career paths. The emerging narrative suggests AI isn't just a tool - it's becoming a competitor and potential replacement in both personal and professional spheres.

sources.title: Momfluencers Are Pitching AI as a Better ‘Coparent’ Than Men
Replies to comments on my "LLMs are eroding my career" post
OpenAI is still working on that ‘super app’

ai.headline: Tech Security Risks Multiply as Config Files Become New Threat Vector
ai.body:
Cybersecurity experts are sounding alarms about a critical vulnerability hiding in plain sight: configuration files that can execute code. These seemingly innocuous documents represent a massive potential supply chain security blindspot - one that could allow malicious actors unprecedented system access. 

The threat extends beyond traditional software environments. Cloud storage services like OneDrive are implementing data expiration policies - a move that suggests growing institutional awareness of persistent digital risks. As technology becomes more complex, the attack surface continues to expand.

sources.title: Config Files That Run Code: Supply Chain Security Blindspot
OneDrive data now has an expiry date
1k Data Breaches Later, the Disclosure Lag Is Worse

food.name: Lavender Honey Roasted Chicken
food.description: Tender roasted chicken infused with delicate lavender and sweet local honey, creating a fragrant and complex flavor profile
food.tip: Use dried culinary lavender sparingly - a little goes a long way to avoid an overly perfumed taste

health.name: Dynamic Desk Decompression
health.description: Implement a micro-movement sequence every 45 minutes to reset spinal alignment and reduce cumulative sitting stress
health.tip: Use a wall to do a 30-second standing back press: stand with heels, buttocks, and shoulders touching the wall, then gently press your lower back into the wall

learn.description: The emerging field of designing cities and infrastructure by directly copying strategies found in natural ecosystems
learn.why: This approach could revolutionize sustainable urban development by learning from billions of years of nature's efficient problem-solving
